description.value:
Archetype Dedication

You have consumed the Mera Mera no Mi, transforming your body into living fire and granting you the Logia Intangibility of the Flame-Human archetype. You gain the following benefits while your Devil Fruit is not suppressed:

  • You are immune to fire damage.
  • Logia Intangibility: Non-magical physical attacks pass harmlessly through your flame-form. You gain immunity to physical damage, except from magical sources.
  • Your unarmed Strikes deal fire damage.

Inherent Weakness: You have weakness 5 to water damage. This weakness is never suppressed, even while Sea-Bound.

All other archetype benefits are suppressed while you are Sea-Bound.
description.gm: The water weakness is deliberately NOT gated on !devil-fruit:suppressed — in One Piece lore, Logia users remain weak to their element's counter even while Sea-Bound.
